title: Apple Pay Payment Request
description: Represents an ApplePayPaymentRequest used to configure an Apple Pay payment session, specifying the merchant capabilities, supported networks, payment amount, and optional shipping and billing requirements.

countryCode.description: The two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the merchant's country of operation

currencyCode.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the payment

supportedNetworks.description: The payment networks the merchant supports

merchantCapabilities.description: The payment capabilities the merchant supports

total.description: The total amount for the payment, including the merchant name as the label

lineItems.description: A list of line items explaining the charges, such as subtotal, tax, discount, and shipping

requiredBillingContactFields.description: The billing contact fields required to process the payment

requiredShippingContactFields.description: The shipping contact fields required to fulfill the order

shippingMethods.description: Available shipping methods for the order

shippingType.description: The type of shipping used for this request, which determines the wording on the payment sheet

shippingContactEditingMode.description: Controls whether the shipping contact can be edited on the payment sheet

applicationData.description: Base64-encoded application-specific data that is included in the payment token hash for verification

supportedCountries.description: A list of ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes for cards that can be used for payment. If not specified, all countries are supported

multiTokenContexts.description: An array of payment token contexts for multi-merchant payments

label.description: A short, localized description of the line item

amount.description: The monetary amount of the line item as a string with decimal notation

type.description: Whether this is a final or pending amount

paymentTiming.description: When the payment will be taken

recurringPaymentStartDate.description: The start date for recurring payments

recurringPaymentIntervalUnit.description: The interval unit for recurring payments

recurringPaymentIntervalCount.description: The number of interval units between recurring payments

recurringPaymentEndDate.description: The end date for recurring payments

deferredPaymentDate.description: The date for a deferred payment

automaticReloadPaymentThresholdAmount.description: The balance threshold that triggers an automatic reload

ContactField.description: A contact field that can be requested from the user

label.description: A short description of the shipping method

detail.description: A longer description of the shipping method

amount.description: The cost of the shipping method

identifier.description: A unique identifier for the shipping method

paymentDescription.description: A description of the recurring payment

regularBilling.description: The regular billing amount and interval

trialBilling.description: The trial billing amount and interval, if applicable

billingAgreement.description: A localized billing agreement for display to the user

managementURL.description: A URL to manage the recurring payment

tokenNotificationURL.description: A URL for receiving lifecycle notifications for the merchant token

AutomaticReloadPaymentRequest.description: Configuration for automatic reload payments (e.g., store cards)

paymentDescription.description: A description of the automatic reload payment

billingAgreement.description: A localized billing agreement for display

managementURL.description: A URL to manage the automatic reload

tokenNotificationURL.description: A URL for receiving lifecycle notifications

merchantIdentifier.description: The merchant identifier for this context

externalIdentifier.description: An external identifier for the merchant

amount.description: The amount for this merchant's portion
